WS_GATEWAY.notes: Removed casino_settings query and setup redirect branches. Added idempotent Casino 1 demo staff binding creation. first_name/last_name derived from email username. 10 tests passing.

WS_DEMO.notes: New server component. Auth→allowlist→admin→staff check sequence. Holding page for approved non-admin with no active staff. Staff query failure falls back gracefully with structured diagnostic (no PII). 8 tests passing.

WS_GUARDS.notes: Guard extended with requireProvisioningAuth option. Fail-closed when PILOT_ADMIN_EMAILS unset. All 4 setup surfaces wired. 15 tests passing. Type-check: 0 errors.

WS_LANDING.notes: 3 CTA locations updated. Hero primary (line 271): /contact→/signin 'Explore Interactive Demo'. Hero secondary (line 279): #operations→/request-access 'Request Production Pilot' (<a>→<Link>). Bottom close (line 604): /contact→/signin 'Explore Interactive Demo'. Build gate: PASS (tsc exit 0, next build exit 0, compiled in 2.4min).

WS_E2E.notes: 3 Playwright scenarios: S1 happy path (auto-bind INSERT + DB verify DEMO- row), S2 idempotency serial (pre-inserted DEMO- row, 2 visits, no duplicate INSERT), S3 regression (non-DEMO staff binding at DEMO_CASINO_ID, idempotency check prevents new INSERT). Mode B (browser login via /auth/login). RLS note documented: staff_read policy requires app.casino_id=current_setting which is unset in /start context; active-staff branch returns null, idempotency serviceClient check is the operative path. Advisory tier per QA-006. Type-check: PASS (exit 0).
